moments.title: World Cup Final: Spain vs. Argentina
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 culminates on Sunday with European champions Spain facing defending South American champions Argentina in the final in New York/New Jersey.

angles.name: Final Showdown
angles.copy: It all comes down to this! Spain face Argentina in the FIFA World Cup 2026 Final on Sunday. Who are you backing for glory?

angles.name: Messi's Last Dance?
angles.copy: Lionel Messi's Argentina take on Spain in a heavyweight World Cup final. Could this be his last chance to lift the trophy again?

angles.name: Closing Ceremony
angles.copy: Post Malone is set to headline the FIFA World Cup 2026 closing ceremony on Sunday, just before kick-off! Get ready for the party.

moments.title: England vs. France 3rd Place Play-off
moments.blurb: After semi-final defeats, England will play France in the FIFA World Cup 2026 third-place match on Saturday.

angles.name: Bronze Medal Match
angles.copy: It's the battle for bronze! England face France in the World Cup 3rd place play-off this Saturday. Can the Three Lions bounce back?

moments.title: The Open Championship 2026 Underway
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship is being played from July 16-19, 2026, at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, Merseyside.

angles.name: Golf Major
angles.copy: The 154th Open Championship is live from Royal Birkdale! Who are you rooting for to lift the Claret Jug this weekend?

angles.name: Merseyside Host
angles.copy: Golf's biggest stars are in Southport! The Open Championship is taking place at Royal Birkdale, putting Merseyside on the global stage.

moments.title: Latitude Festival returns next week
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival will take place from July 23-26, 2026, at Henham Park in Suffolk, celebrating its 20th anniversary with a diverse lineup.

angles.name: Festival Countdown
angles.copy: The countdown is on for Latitude Festival! Henham Park is gearing up for a huge weekend of music, comedy, and arts from July 23-26.

angles.name: Suffolk's Big Weekend
angles.copy: Who's ready for Latitude? Suffolk is about to host one of the UK's best festivals, with David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi headlining!

moments.title: UK Heatwave Persists
moments.blurb: England and Wales continue to experience significant heatwave conditions, with temperatures exceeding 30°C and hosepipe bans in effect in several areas.

angles.name: Stay Cool
angles.copy: Another hot one today! The heatwave across England and Wales is set to continue. Remember to stay hydrated and keep cool.

angles.name: Hosepipe Bans
angles.copy: With the heatwave persisting, hosepipe bans are now in effect for millions across parts of England. Remember to conserve water!

angles.name: Devon Temperatures
angles.copy: Devon is feeling the heat! Temperatures hit 33C in Yelverton recently, and the scorching weather is set to continue. Stay safe out there, Exe-ter!

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday Brian May
moments.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday on Sunday, July 19.

angles.name: Rock Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 79th Birthday to Queen's iconic guitarist, the one and only Brian May! What's your favourite Queen riff?

angles.name: Queen's Sound
angles.copy: The man behind some of the greatest guitar solos ever! Happy 79th Birthday to Queen legend Brian May!

moments.title: Happy 33rd Birthday Fred again..
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning DJ and producer Fred again.. celebrates his 33rd birthday on Sunday, July 19.

angles.name: Dance Floor King
angles.copy: Big beats and happy vibes! Wishing a fantastic 33rd Birthday to the incredible Fred again..! What's your top track from him?

angles.name: Hit Producer
angles.copy: Happy 33rd Birthday to producer extraordinaire, Fred again..! From huge collaborations to his own anthems, he keeps the hits coming.

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday Carlos Santana
moments.blurb: Legendary guitarist Carlos Santana, known for his distinctive blend of rock, Latin, and blues, turns 79 on Monday, July 20.

angles.name: Guitar Icon
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the legendary Carlos Santana! That iconic guitar tone is unmistakable. What's your favourite Santana track?

angles.name: Smooth Sounds
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible Carlos Santana, who turns 79 today! His music continues to inspire generations.

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday Don Henley
moments.blurb: Don Henley, co-founder, drummer, and vocalist of The Eagles, celebrates his 79th birthday on Wednesday, July 22.

angles.name: Eagles Drummer
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the voice behind so many Eagles hits, Don Henley! What's your favourite track he sang lead on?

angles.name: Solo Success
angles.copy: From 'Hotel California' to 'The Boys of Summer', Happy 79th Birthday to Don Henley, a true rock icon!

moments.title: Happy 34th Birthday Selena Gomez
moments.blurb: Singer, actress, and businesswoman Selena Gomez celebrates her 34th birthday on Wednesday, July 22.

angles.name: Pop Star
angles.copy: Happy 34th Birthday to the multi-talented Selena Gomez! From Disney star to pop sensation, she's done it all.

angles.name: Actress & Singer
angles.copy: Celebrating Selena Gomez's 34th birthday today! Which of her tracks or roles is your favourite?

moments.title: Happy 61st Birthday Slash
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses' iconic lead guitarist, Slash, born Saul Hudson, turns 61 on Thursday, July 23.

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: That top hat and those riffs! Happy 61st Birthday to the one and only Slash from Guns N' Roses!

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy Birthday to the legendary Slash! His guitar work defined a generation of rock.

moments.title: Happy 55th Birthday Alison Krauss
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning bluegrass and country singer Alison Krauss celebrates her 55th birthday on Thursday, July 23.

angles.name: Bluegrass Queen
angles.copy: Happy 55th Birthday to the incredibly talented Alison Krauss! Her voice is pure magic.

angles.name: Country Star
angles.copy: Celebrating the amazing Alison Krauss on her 55th birthday! A true treasure in music.

moments.title: Happy 57th Birthday Jennifer Lopez
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez, known as J.Lo, celebrates her 57th birthday on Friday, July 24.

angles.name: J.Lo's Day
angles.copy: Happy 57th Birthday to the one and only J.Lo! Still ruling the dance floor and the big screen.

angles.name: Pop Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible Jennifer Lopez on her 57th birthday! From 'Jenny from the Block' to global icon.

moments.title: Happy 74th Birthday Stewart Copeland
moments.blurb: The Police drummer and co-founder Stewart Copeland turns 74 on Friday, July 24.

angles.name: Rhythmic Genius
angles.copy: Happy 74th Birthday to the rhythmic genius, Stewart Copeland of The Police! What's your favourite drum beat from him?

angles.name: The Police Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible Stewart Copeland on his 74th birthday! A founding member of The Police and a drumming icon.
